description_long: This is a modern, low-profile sofa with a sleek, rectangular silhouette and clean lines, upholstered in a dark, likely leather or faux-leather material. The sofa features three distinct seat cushions and a continuous, straight backrest, complemented by two large, loose back pillows placed at either end. The armrests are broad, straight, and at the same height as the backrest, giving the piece a boxy, contemporary appearance. The base of the sofa is solid and slightly recessed, creating a floating effect above the ground. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting. The overall design is minimalist, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor lounges.
description: A sleek, modern dark sofa with three seat cushions, two large loose pillows, and broad, straight armrests. The upholstery is smooth and the base is recessed for a floating effect.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat cushions, two large loose pillows at each end, and broad, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sofa, the thickness of the armrest, and the placement of the pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the tops of the two large pillows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, showing the armrest and pillow arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, rectangular seat cushions and two large, loose back pillows placed at each end; all cushions are visually separate and not attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the base is a solid, recessed plinth that gives the sofa a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight, low-profile backrest running the full length of the sofa, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth upholstery with no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
